response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack/web developer with strong testing discipline and entrepreneurial drive, but the role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems. C++ exposure is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015. Primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, with no demonstrated cloud compute platform leadership or production-scale distributed systems architecture at the scale implied by the JD.
strengths: Long track record across diverse stacks with strong TDD/craftsmanship discipline
Mentoring/teaching experience via workshops, dojos, and Selenium course
concerns: Only ~6 months of C++ experience vs. 8-year requirement
No evidence of large-scale cloud compute platform or distributed systems leadership
No formal tech-lead title or experience mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at scale

key_factors.factor: C++ experience gap (≈6 months vs 8 years required)
Lack of large-scale cloud compute / distributed systems leadership
Strong software craftsmanship and mentoring background
